# hooks-public-update-node-at-path

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for updateNodeAtPath

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useUpdateNodeAtPathMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useUpdateNodeAtPathMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useUpdateNodeAtPathMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
